title: elionurus gabonensis
intro: Elionurus gabonensis, also known as the West African feather grass, is a species of grass native to West Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Elionurus gabonensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve the use of its leaves and stems, which can be dried, powdered, and used in teas, infusions, or topical applications.
